t: [...] And the children [of Israel] wept [over Moses in the steppes of Moab]
[by the Jordan, close to] Jericho, in Bet-Yeshimot [as far as Abel ha- Shittim, for thirty days]
[and they completed the days of weeping and] mourning for Moses. And the children of Is[rael ...]
[... fe]ar of you and dread of you [...]
